narrative: ED triage 2026-05-21 11:02 — 68-year-old male, confused and lethargic, brought by family. Vital signs danger zone: HR 142, RR 32, SpO2 88% on room air, BP 84/52, temp 39.8°C. Severe pain reported. High-risk situation suspected (possible sepsis). Triage nurse mistakenly assigned ESI 3 despite danger-zone vitals — must upgrade to ESI 2 (or ESI 1 if airway compromise). No immediate resus bay assigned. MD not notified within 10 min.
